zh.Minster Lovel, Cornbury, Oxfordshire, En: 英國奧可福爾明斯特 洛弗爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Lovell於1191年之後出生在英國奧可福爾可恩波利時，他的父親William Lovel8865歲，母親Isabel de Montague8845歲。他於1216年與Katherine de Bassett在英國奧可福爾明斯特 洛弗爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1252年12月23日之前在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.Minster Lovel, Cornbury, Oxfordshire, En: 英国奧可福爾明斯特 洛弗爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Lovell于1191年之后出生在英国奧可福爾可恩波利时，他的父亲William Lovel8865岁，母亲Isabel de Montague8845岁。他于1216年与Katherine de Bassett在英国奧可福爾明斯特 洛弗爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1252年12月23日之前在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Lovell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lovel ‘wolf cub’, a diminutive of lou, love ‘wolf’. Compare Love and Low .

variants.name: Lowell
meanings: English: variant of Lovell , derived from Anglo-Norman Frenchlou ‘wolf’ + the diminutive suffix -el.

History: Lowell is the surname of one of America's most distinguished NewEngland families, which have been prominent for over 200 years. Itsfounder, John Lowell (1743–1802), was a legislator and judge. Thecity of Lowell, MA was named in honor of his son Francis Cabot Lowell(1775–1817), a textile manufacturer.

variants.name: Love
meanings: English: from a Middle English personal name derived from the Old English female name Lufu ‘love’, or the masculine equivalent Lufa. Compare Leaf 2.

English and Scottish: nickname from Anglo-Norman French love ‘she-wolf’ or simply ‘wolf’, the word love being a back-formation from the diminutive forms lovel and lovet ‘little wolf’. See also Low 3, from Anglo-Norman French lou, the more usual form of the word.
Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhionghuin (see McKinnon ).

variants.name: Loveall
meanings: English: presumably a variant of   Lovell  , or possibly a habitational name from Lovehall in Tayside.

variants.name: Lovewell
meanings: English (mainly Norfolk): from Middle English love ‘love’ (Old English lufian ‘to love’) + wel ‘well’ (Old English wel), presumably denoting a lover or philanderer. There may have been some confusion with Lovell .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When John Lovell was born after 1191, in Cornbury, Oxfordshire, England, his father, William Lovel, was 8865 and his mother, Isabel de Montague, was 8845. He married Katherine de Bassett in 1216, in Minster Lovell, Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died before 23 December 1252, in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Lovell est né après 1191, à Cornbury, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, William Lovel, avait 8865 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Montague, avait 8845 ans. Il a épousé Katherine de Bassett en 1216, à Minster Lovell, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 23 décembre 1252, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Lovell nach 1191 in Cornbury, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Lovel 8865 und seine Mutter Isabel de Montague 8845. Er hat 1216 in Minster Lovell, Oxfordshire, England Katherine de Bassett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 23. Dezember 1252 in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Lovell è nato il dopo il 1191 nel Cornbury, Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, William Lovel, aveva 8865 anni e il suo madre, Isabel de Montague, aveva 8845 anni. Lui sposato Katherine de Bassett nel 1216, nel Minster Lovell, Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 23 dicembre 1252, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Lovellが1191年以後にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアコルンブリーで生まれた時，父William Lovelは8865歳，母Isabel de Montagueは8845歳であった。1216年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアミンスター ロベルでKatherine de Bassettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1252年12月23日以前にイギリスイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Lovell(이)가 1191년 이후 영국 스퍼드실르 코른버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Lovel(은)는 8865세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Montague(은)는 8845세였다. 그는 1216년 영국 스퍼드실르 민스터 러벨에서 Katherine de Bassett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1252년 12월 23일 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했다.

mn.after 1191–Bef 23 December 1252: 1191 оноос хойш–1252 оны Арванхоёрдугаар сарын 23–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Lovell nasceu após 1191, em Cornbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Lovel, tinha 8865 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Montague, tinha 8845 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine de Bassett em 1216, em Minster Lovell, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 23 de dezembro de 1252, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Lovell родился после 1191 г. в местности корнбури, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Lovel было 8865 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Montague, 8845. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine de Bassett в 1216 г. в местности минстир лавелл, оксфордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 23 декабрь 1252 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания.
